probes.name: cloudflare_deploy
probes.evidence: Wrangler deployed Worker and Assets; custom routes for blackimg.online/* and www.blackimg.online/* deployed; current Worker version fa7dff30-59ff-4656-8566-f03c94f2959d.

probes.name: workers_dev_preview
probes.evidence: https://blackimg-online.yangdengkui01.workers.dev/ returns 200 with the homepage; /api/runtime, /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml, /api/checkout, and /missing were checked.

probes.name: cloudflare_zone_routes_dns
probes.evidence: Cloudflare zone exists with pending status, apex/www proxied A records, full SSL, Always Use HTTPS, automatic HTTPS rewrites, and Worker routes for apex and www.

probes.name: registrar_nameservers
probes.evidence: SpaceShip API accepted custom nameservers archer.ns.cloudflare.com and sydney.ns.cloudflare.com for blackimg.online.

probes.name: public_dnssec
probes.evidence: Public DNS-over-HTTPS returns DS key tag 34646 and DNSKEY Missing no SEP matching the DS. Validating resolvers still fail, so apex HTTPS is not live yet.

probes.name: public_ns_propagation
probes.evidence: DNS-over-HTTPS with checking disabled still returns cached launch1/launch2.spaceship.net nameservers during propagation.

probes.name: paypal_checkout
probes.evidence: PayPal credentials are missing; checkout endpoint returns configuration error instead of fake payment.

probes.name: ai_generation
probes.evidence: AI_IMAGE_ENDPOINT and AI_IMAGE_API_KEY are not configured.

probes.name: d1_analytics
probes.evidence: ANALYTICS_DB is optional and not configured.

completionLedger.evidence: Worker/routes are deployed, but production domain validation is blocked by stale DS / DNS propagation and provider secrets are missing.
